source_context.core_idea: Embry and Kai steal a Wednesday surf window at Kahalu'u Bay on the Kona Coast in June 2024.
source_context.story: Embry waits through heat, glare, and local lineup pressure until the right shoulder opens over the lava reef. Kai keeps position outside and lets the first peak go to the local already angled in.

environment.description: Hot, humid Kona Coast surf conditions with glare, saltwater, softened wax, fatigue, summer swell timing, lava reef constraints, and local lineup etiquette.

interaction_matrix.story_function: Waits, chooses the second shoulder, and commits without cutting across the lineup.
interaction_matrix.environment_interaction: Heat, glare, salt, and softened wax make fatigue and resolve visible.

interaction_matrix.story_function: Holds position outside and reads the reef, channel, locals, and Embry's cadence.
interaction_matrix.environment_interaction: Spray, swell rhythm, and etiquette shape his restraint.

interaction_matrix.story_function: Forces a safe channel choice and makes the timing consequential.
interaction_matrix.environment_interaction: Visible dark reef shapes below clear water constrain the line.

linked_assets.title: Embry contact sheet
linked_assets.description: Navy rashguard, heat response, salt at temples, visible fatigue.

linked_assets.title: Kai contact sheet
linked_assets.description: Black rashguard, calm restraint, spray and lineup awareness.
